headline: Fortinet Breach And AI Exploit Fears Reframe Long Term Investment Story
summary: Fortinet disclosed a critical vulnerability, CVE-2026-35616, in its FortiClient Endpoint Management Server that has been actively exploited and flagged in the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. Government agencies are urging customers to apply hotfixes or upgrade affected systems, highlighting sector wide concern around endpoint security. At the same time, reports of an advanced autonomous AI exploit model are raising broader cybersecurity risks and focusing attention on vendors such...
